landing.title: bobot
landing.subtitle: Everybody's AI Assistant
landing.description: A self-hosted personal AI assistant with multi-user support, topic-based conversations, task management, scheduling, and push notifications.
landing.data_description: bobot is self-hosted, meaning all your data stays on your own server. When you connect Google Calendar, bobot accesses your calendar events to help with scheduling and reminders. No data is shared with third parties.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how bobot handles your data.
privacy.google_description: When you connect your Google Calendar, bobot requests access to:
privacy.google_scope_events: View and manage your calendar events — used for creating reminders, scheduling, and viewing your agenda
privacy.google_scope_calendars: View your list of calendars (read-only) — used to let you choose which calendar to use
privacy.how_used_chat: Chat messages are processed by your configured AI provider to generate responses
privacy.how_used_calendar: Calendar data is used for scheduling, reminders, and AI-assisted calendar management
privacy.how_used_tasks: Task data is managed within your conversations
privacy.storage_description: bobot is a self-hosted application. All data is stored locally on your server in a SQLite database. No data is sent to or stored on external servers, except for messages sent to your configured AI provider for processing.
privacy.sharing_description: bobot does not share your data with any third parties. Your data remains on your server under your control.
privacy.contact_description: For questions about this privacy policy, contact the administrator of your bobot instance.
tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.intro: By using bobot ("Service"), you agree to the following:
tos.risk_description: The Service provides AI-generated responses and may be incorrect or incomplete. Do not rely on it for medical, legal, financial, or safety-critical decisions.
tos.guarantees_description: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee accuracy, availability, or fitness for any purpose.
tos.responsibility_description: You agree not to use the Service for illegal, harmful, abusive, or misleading activities.
tos.privacy_description: Your messages may be stored and used to operate and improve the Service. Do not share sensitive personal information. See our Privacy Policy for details.
tos.liability_description: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any damages resulting from your use of the Service.
tos.changes_description: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the Service means you accept the updated terms.
tos.disagree: If you do not agree with these terms, do not use the Service.
